channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Eight Strategies to Reduce Ultra-Processed Foods in Family Diets
item.description: The article outlines eight practical strategies for reducing the consumption of ultra-processed foods (UPF) within families, emphasizing long-term consistency and systemic changes. Key approaches incl...

item.title: Andrea Johnson admits legal mandate error in corruption probe
item.description: The Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (Idac) head, Andrea Johnson, admitted to an error in determining whether the corruption case against police crime intelligence head Lt-Gen Dumisani Khu...

item.title: Mine Trade Pledges to Support Tanzanian Mining Sector
item.description: The article discusses Mine Trade's commitment to include Tanzanians in the mining sector, emphasizing efforts to create opportunities for local involvement. The initiative aims to foster economic grow...

item.title: Elon Musk's AI-Driven 'Odyssey' Project Faces Criticism Amid Nolan's Adaptation Success
item.description: Elon Musk has announced plans to create an AI-generated film adaptation of Homer's 'Odyssey,' claiming it will be 'historically accurate' and 'true to the art of Homer.' The project, spearheaded by hi...

item.title: Kenya Government Reassures Burundi Nationals After Viral Incident
item.description: A viral video showing a Kenyan man confronting a Burundian tea and mandazi vendor sparked public outrage, with many calling for the aggressor's arrest. The incident, described as xenophobic by observe...

item.title: Senate impeachment court orders ex-Landbank managers to testify in Sara Duterte's trial
item.description: The Senate impeachment court has approved subpoenas for two former Land Bank of the Philippines branch managers, Violeta Constantino and Nenita Camposano, to appear in the trial of Vice President Sara...

item.title: US Treasury Secretary Commends Pakistan's Economic Reforms and Path to Capital Markets
item.description: The US Treasury Secretary, Scott Bessent, has praised Pakistan's progress in implementing economic reforms and its efforts to re-enter international capital markets. During a meeting with Finance Mini...

item.title: Federal judge allows appellate review of Trump's Jan. 6 tweet immunity claim
item.description: A federal judge has certified for appellate review whether President Donald Trump's January 6, 2021 tweet about the Capitol riot was protected by presidential immunity. U.S. District Judge Amit Mehta ...

item.title: Indonesia Awards 12 Tanzanians with Master's Scholarships via Global Program
item.description: Indonesia has honored 12 Tanzanians with Master's degrees through a global scholarship initiative, marking a significant step in educational collaboration between the two nations. The event, held on J...

item.title: Calgary Stampeders Add WR Alford and DB Boykin to Roster
item.description: The Calgary Stampeders have signed Canadian wide receiver Damien Alford and defensive back Lance Boykin, adding depth to their roster for the 2025 CFL season. Alford, selected first overall in the 202...

item.title: Gunmen Attack Passenger Bus in Balochistan's Mastung, 3 Killed, 5 Injured
item.description: A gun attack on a Karachi-bound passenger bus in Balochistan's Mastung district left three people dead and five others injured, while an explosion damaged a bridge on the National Highway, disrupting ...

item.title: Andy Burnham to review early release scheme amid PC Harper killers' release controversy
item.description: Prime Minister Andy Burnham has announced a review of the government’s prisoner early release scheme following widespread public backlash over the release of two individuals convicted in the 2019 kill...

item.title: Philippines and China clash over construction activities on disputed ship
item.description: The Chinese envoy, Jing Quan, accused Filipinos of violating an agreement by conducting construction work on the BRP Sierra Madre, a Philippine military vessel stationed in disputed waters. The confro...

item.title: Albanese expands 'Paid Prac' to support 10 new health professions
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese will announce at the 50th Labor National Conference in Adelaide the extension of the 'Paid Prac' program to 10 new health professional categories. The initiative, which...

item.title: Three Must-See Theatre Productions in Johannesburg: From Emotional Depth to Escapism
item.description: This article highlights three theatre productions currently running in Johannesburg, offering a range of experiences from emotionally charged narratives to lighthearted escapism. 'Words & Nightmares' ...

item.title: Court Dismisses Sowore's Document Submission in Tinubu Defamation Case
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja rejected an attempt by Omoyele Sowore, a publisher and AAC presidential candidate, to submit uncertified documents in his defamation trial against President Tinubu. Jus...

item.title: Cyril Ramaphosa awaits court ruling on Phala Phala inquiry interdict
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa faces a critical legal juncture as the Western Cape High Court prepares to rule on his urgent application for an interdict to halt the parliamentary impeachment inquiry into ...

item.title: Success of Local Content Policy Boosts Tanzanian Involvement in Mining Sector
item.description: Minister Anthony Mavunde highlighted the success of Tanzania's local content policy, which has increased Tanzanian participation in the mining sector. He noted that over six million Tanzanians now eng...

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial Advances as Prosecution Concludes Case
item.description: The Senate impeachment court concluded its proceedings on Article 4 against Vice President Sara Duterte on July 22, 2026, after the prosecution presented its case alleging culpable violation of the Co...

item.title: Rosie O’Donnell Shares Struggles with Trump’s Attacks and Mental Health Impact
item.description: Comedian Rosie O’Donnell has opened up about the long-term psychological effects of her 20-year feud with former President Donald Trump, describing her experience as akin to post-traumatic stress diso...
